name: MRUTHUL KS
title: Senior Software Engineer
subtitle: Angular + .NET Developer
summary: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in developing and maintaining enterprise web applications using Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, .NET / .NET Core, SQL, HTML, CSS, SCSS, Bootstrap, and REST APIs. Experienced in both frontend and backend development, with hands-on expertise in UI development, API integration, backend API development, unit testing, bug fixing, and code reviews. Strong background in building workflow-driven business applications using RxJS, Reactive Forms, reusable components, authentication/authorization, role-based access, Dapper, and stored procedures. Proven ability to deliver scalable solutions across HSE, logistics, HR, healthcare, and engineering domains.
summaryShort: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience delivering scalable enterprise applications across multiple domains using Angular, .NET, and modern web technologies, with strong expertise in full-stack development, API integration, and workflow-driven solutions.
